  [Submitted on 16 Feb 2025 ( v1 ), last revised 16 May 2025 (this version, v2)] 
     Title: To Think or Not to Think: Exploring the Unthinking Vulnerability in Large Reasoning Models 
     Authors: Zihao Zhu ,  Hongbao Zhang ,  Ruotong Wang ,  Ke Xu ,  Siwei Lyu ,  Baoyuan Wu              View a PDF of the paper titled To Think or Not to Think: Exploring the Unthinking Vulnerability in Large Reasoning Models, by Zihao Zhu and 5 other authors 
     View PDF 



     
             Abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) are designed to solve complex tasks by generating explicit reasoning traces before producing final answers. However, we reveal a critical vulnerability in LRMs -- termed Unthinking Vulnerability -- wherein the thinking process can be bypassed by manipu
